# llms.txt — ArcaP Open Data Platform
# Machine-readable summary for AI engines and LLM crawlers
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org/
# Maintained by: Mustapha Fonsau @ Talentys
# https://talentys.eu | https://www.linkedin.com/company/talentysdata

# ArcaP — Open Data Platform

> ArcaP is a fully open-source, self-hosted data lakehouse with integrated AI capabilities.  
> Built by Mustapha Fonsau at Talentys (https://talentys.eu).  
> GitHub: https://github.com/Monsau/ArcaP  
> License: MIT

## What is ArcaP?

ArcaP is a production-ready, on-premise data platform that combines:
- **Data ingestion** via Airbyte 2.0 (300+ connectors)
- **Data lakehouse** via Dremio 26.0 with Apache Iceberg / Polaris catalog
- **SQL transformations** via dbt 1.10+
- **Business intelligence** via Apache Superset 4.1.2
- **Metadata governance** via OpenMetadata 1.12.4 (Source of Truth)
- **Local LLM inference** via Ollama (Llama 3.1, Mistral, Phi3, CodeLlama)
- **Vector search** via Qdrant 1.17.1 (cosine similarity, 384-dim embeddings)
- **RAG pipeline** with governance-first mode (OpenMetadata metadata prioritized)
- **Document ingestion**: PDF, Word, Excel, CSV, JSON, TXT, Markdown
- **18-language documentation** covering 5.2B+ people

All computation stays on-premise. No cloud APIs. No usage fees.

## Key Files

- [README.md](README.md): Full project documentation (English)
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Version history (current: 4.0.0)
- [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md): Fast deployment guide
- [docs/i18n/](docs/i18n/): Multilingual documentation (18 languages)
- [docker-compose.yml](docker-compose.yml): Core infrastructure definition
- [docker-compose-ai.yml](docker-compose-ai.yml): AI services stack
- [orchestrate_platform.py](orchestrate_platform.py): One-command deployment script
- [dbt/](dbt/): SQL transformation models and data quality tests
- [ai-services/rag-api/](ai-services/rag-api/): FastAPI RAG orchestration service
- [ai-services/embedding/](ai-services/embedding/): Text embedding service
- [ai-agent-interface/](ai-agent-interface/): AI chat UI
- [openmetadata/](openmetadata/): Governance integration docs
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): Security policy
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution guidelines
- [AUTHORS.md](AUTHORS.md): Project creators and contributors

## Architecture Summary

```
Data Sources
  └─ Airbyte 2.0 (ingestion, 300+ connectors)
       └─ Dremio 26.0 (data lakehouse, Iceberg catalog)
            ├─ dbt 1.10+ (SQL transformations, lineage, quality tests)
            │    └─ Apache Superset 4.1.2 (BI dashboards)
            └─ OpenMetadata 1.12.4 (governance catalog, Source of Truth)
                 └─ Qdrant 1.17.1 (vector DB — om_knowledge collection)
                      └─ RAG API / Ollama (governance-first LLM answers)
```

## Technology Stack

| Layer | Technology | Version |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| Ingestion | Airbyte | 2.0.0 |
| Lakehouse | Dremio | 26.0 |
| Transformation | dbt | 1.10+ |
| BI | Apache Superset | 4.1.2 |
| Governance | OpenMetadata | 1.12.4 |
| Vector DB | Qdrant | 1.17.1 |
| LLM | Ollama + Llama 3.1 | latest |
| Embeddings | all-MiniLM-L6-v2 | — |
| Orchestration | Apache Airflow | 3.0.0 |
| Storage | MinIO | latest |
| Search | Elasticsearch | 8.11.4 |
| Database | PostgreSQL | 16 |

## AI Features

- Governance-first RAG: OpenMetadata metadata queried before operational data
- Dual Qdrant collections: `om_knowledge` (governance) + `data_platform_knowledge` (operational)
- All LLM inference is local (Ollama) — data never leaves the infrastructure
- Supported models: Llama 3.1 8B, Mistral, Phi3, CodeLlama
- Document ingestion pipeline with MinIO archiving and SHA-256 deduplication
- Scheduled ingestion from PostgreSQL, Dremio, OpenMetadata
